item.title: I think I’m a hoarder… pt. 19

item.dc:creator: dirtyFrenchman

item.title: Oopsies, Ouchies, & Oh shits! #2 (Weak Willed be Warned)
item.description:
Oopsies
Ouchies
Oh shit! Recommended Listening: https://youtu.be/qpn_w3EbTjU
FAIR WARNING: If you happen to find that videos #4 and #5 are your limit.
Then please continue on to the next post. Enjoy the rest of your day (:
If you’re still here then safety first! Strap in, strap up, strap on.
Just kidding! Fuck safety (: (I’m just acting tough to impress the other guys. I would never let anything happen to you sugar bear <3)
Weeee
Buh god here comes a crack head with the steel chair!
*monch* *monch* monch*
I sentence you to hornijail
Bailiff, whack his pee pee!
See(4) how dangerous plastic can be!
Me when my posts piss people off.
Tesla drivers eat snickers upside down so they can feel the veins on their tongue.
MFW “Hi there! We’re writing to let you know…”
I love the internet so much I just wanna *bite*
Whack-a-molé
Skies over Germany circa 1943 (colorized)
Meanwhile I crack my neck wrong and I can’t turn left for a day…
“The pranks not that bad bro.” The prank:
Me avoiding suspensions.
Should probably get some ice on that.
Why men live longer than women.
Have a breather. (But stay focused)
This shit stain got off light if you ask me..
How to lose a girl in 10 sec
Can’t park your fire there mate.
NYC isn’t real.
If he was 3ft taller this would’ve ended badly.
ROADHOUSE
POV: you lookin like a snack. (I’m the bear)
It’s literally ALWAYS ego.
HFW I unzip
I finally have a hot body c:
The response was much more organized than I expected.
GTA 6 looks sick.
Messing with the wildlife. It’s a bold strategy cotton, let’s see if it pays off for her.
Never let em know your next move
Fuck around and find out. There are designated targets for a reason.
Omg paparazzi! *pose*
You’re almost there, don’t shoot yourself yet! Final level @ #47
“You get what you fucking deserve!” - Joker
Drop your weapon! *twerks*
Reminds me of the time 3 bullies wanted to jump me in high school. So I brought my sword from saber team practice (: Long story short: they ran.
Me when the gravity is sideways.
I found this one the hardest to watch.
YFW this post
“This is not funny. These people were seriously hur-“
item.dc:creator: trashpanduh

item.title: This is Adolf, one giant handsome Galapagos Tortoise. He loves his neck rubs and for being 106 years old, he still looks young and appreciates the little things
item.dc:creator: GinglaBambino

item.title: An Amazing Gift From My Spouse: 1960's Bulova Accutron SpaceView Watch With A Galaxy Spiral Hologram By Laserboyholo
item.description: I had this 1960's Bulova Accutron SpaceView watch sitting in my drawer with a broken crystal for years. My spouse decided to surprise me for our anniversary by not only getting it fixed, but also having a custom galaxy spiral hologram made by @Laserboyholo to install inside. The video does not do it justice. In person it looks like the galaxy is popping out the front of the crystal!
item.dc:creator: sarbaaz37
